profile.name: Kishore
profile.summary: Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building production-ready applications using Next.js, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, and TypeScript. Strong focus on performance, clean UI, REST APIs, and scalable architecture.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

projects.name: Portfolio Builder
projects.description: Built a resume-to-portfolio generator using Next.js and TypeScript, enabling users to generate SEO-optimized, responsive portfolios using reusable templates.

projects.name: S3 UI
projects.description: Simple S3 File Manager - A lightweight web interface for browsing, uploading, and deleting files/folders in any AWS S3 bucket using dynamic credentials stored in localStorage.

projects.name: Heart Disease Predictor
projects.description: ML-powered REST API using FastAPI to predict heart disease based on patient data. It uses a trained scikit-learn model and provides real-time predictions from features like age, sex, cholesterol, and blood pressure.

projects.name: Movie Booking Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack movie booking platform from scratch with seat selection, show listings, and booking management. Designed a relational PostgreSQL schema and implemented type-safe queries using Drizzle ORM.

projects.name: Chat Application (Mobile App)
projects.description: Built a mobile chat application with user authentication and one-to-one messaging. Developed a RESTful backend using Express.js and MongoDB for user data and message persistence. Integrated API communication between the React Native client and backend services.
